threats.title: Foxconn Attack Highlights Manufacturing's Cyber Crisis

threats.title: Most Remediation Programs Never Confirm the Fix Actually Worked
threats.summary: Security teams have never had better visibility into their environments and never been worse at confirming what they fix stays fixed.
